creator: royger@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to dwmw2 from comment #37)
You should be able to switch back to TSC at runtime with:
# sysctl kern.timecounter.hardware=TSC
You can also set it in loader.conf to select at boot time. I think older versions of FreeBSD name this TSC-low, so check kern.timecounter.choice for the option name.
